debug_info.goal:
case refine_4.true
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
c : Error.Agent n
o : Error.maxOne n (Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ)
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_t : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
T : Error.Dist n
τ : Error.OSequence n
same_len : Error.OSequence.length n τ = σ.length
C : Error.Call n
not_in_callee :
  (b, false) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∨
    (b, false) ∈ Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩
equ :
  Error.equiv n (Error.OSequence.length n ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) a
    (S,
      ⟨⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩,
        Error.resultSet._proof_1 n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
    (T, ⟨τ, ⋯⟩)
role_C : Error.Role.Caller = Error.roleOfIn n a C
same_contrib :
  (Error.contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ (Error.Call.normal n a c)).2 =
    (Error.contribSet n T τ C).2
h_b : @S b = true
⊢ @T b = true

failed_attempts: is

| mk τ oτ =>
                    simp [Error.OSequence.length] at same_len
                    simp [Error.OSequence.length, same_len]⟩
                (by
                  cases τ with
                  | mk τ oτ =>
                    simp [Error.OSequence.length] at same_len
                    simp [Error.OSequence.length, same_len])
                this
              simp [Error.eval, Error.resultSet, hb] at this

have hneq : (S.switch b) b ≠ T b := by
                simp [Dist.switch, hbT', h_b]
              have h_equ : Error.equiv n (Error.OSequence.length n ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) a
                  (S.switch b,
                    ⟨⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩,
                      Error.resultSet._proof_1 n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                  (T, ⟨τ, ⋯⟩) := by
                simpa [equiv, hswitch] using equ
              have hb_eq : (S.switch b) b = T b := by
                exact know_self _ _ _ _ _ h_equ
              exact hneq hb_eq
bT

have hbS : S b = true := h_b
              have hbT : S b = T b := by
                have := know_self (a := b) _ _ _ (h1 := rfl) (h2 := by simpa [OSequence.length] using same_len) equ
                simpa using this
              exact (hbS.trans hbT).symm
bT.symm

have hbT : S b = T b := by
                have hlen : Error.OSequence.length n ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ = σ.length := by
                  simp [Error.OSequence.length]
                exact (know_self (n := n) (a := a) (m := σ.length)
                  (S := S) (T := T)
                  (σ := ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                  (τ := τ) hlen (by simpa [Error.OSequence.length] using same_len) equ)
              simpa [h_b] using hbT.symm

true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              have hbIn : (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                simpa [Error.eval] using hbK
              have hbNotDel :
                  ¬ (b, true) ∈
                      ({⟨j, d⟩ |
                          ∀ T τ D,
                            Error.equiv n (Error.OSequence.length n ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                                  a
                                  (S,
                                    ⟨⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩,
                                      Error.resultSet._proof_1 n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                                  (T, τ) →
                              Error.roleOfIn n a (Error.Call.normal n a c) = Error.roleOfIn n a D →
                              Prod.snd (Error.contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                                      (Error.Call.normal n a c)) =
                                Prod.snd (Error.contribSet n T τ D) →
                              Error.eval n T τ (Error.Form.Has n j (j, !d)) }) := by
                intro hbDel
                have hbWrong : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)) := by
                  have hbDel' := (by
                    simpa [Error.resultSet, Error.roleOfIn, hbS] using hbDel :
                      ∀ T τ D,
                        Error.equiv n (Error.OSequence.length n ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                              a
                              (S,
                                ⟨⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩,
                                  Error.resultSet._proof_1 n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                              (T, τ) →
                          Error.roleOfIn n a (Error.Call.normal n a c) = Error.roleOfIn n a D →
                          Prod.snd (Error.contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                                  (Error.Call.normal n a c)) =
                            Prod.snd (Error.contribSet n T τ D) →
                          Error.eval n T τ (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
                  have := hbDel' S ⟨⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩, by simp [Error.OSequence.length]⟩
                    (Error.Call.normal n a c) (by simpa) (by simp [Error.roleOfIn]) (by simp [Error.contribSet])
                  exact this
                have : False := by
                  have hbTrue : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) :=
                    true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                  have hbFalse : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)) := hbWrong
                  simpa [Error.eval, Set.mem_singleton_iff] using
                    (show (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n b S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ ∧
                          (b, false) ∈ Error.resultSet n b S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ from
                      ⟨by simpa [Error.eval] using hbTrue, by simpa [Error.eval] using hbFalse⟩)
                exact this.elim
              have hbNotRef :
                  ¬ (b, true) ∈
                      {⟨j, d⟩ |
                        Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                            (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n j (j, !d))) } := by
                intro hbRef
                have : Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                    (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false))) := by
                  simpa [hbS] using hbRef
                exact a_not_know_before_f this
              have hbInUnion :
                  (b, true) ∈
                      (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ ∪
                        Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) := by
                simpa [Error.resultSet, Error.roleOfIn, hbS] using hbIn
              have : (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ := by
                have hbInDiff1 :
                    (b, true) ∈
                        (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ ∪
                          Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) \
                          {⟨j, d⟩ |
                            Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                                (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n j (j, !d))) } := by
                  exact ⟨hbInUnion, hbNotRef⟩
                have hbInDiff2 :
                    (b, true) ∈
                        ((Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ ∪
                            Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) \
                            {⟨j, d⟩ |
                              Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                                  (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n j (j, !d))) }) \
                          {⟨j, d⟩ |
                            ∀ T τ D,
                              Error.equiv n (Error.OSequence.length n ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                                    a
                                    (S,
                                      ⟨⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩,
                                        Error.resultSet._proof_1 n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                                    (T, τ) →
                                Error.roleOfIn n a (Error.Call.normal n a c) = Error.roleOfIn n a D →
                                Prod.snd (Error.contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                                        (Error.Call.normal n a c)) =
                                  Prod.snd (Error.contribSet n T τ D) →
                                Error.eval n T τ (Error.Form.Has n j (j, !d)) } := by
                  exact ⟨hbInDiff1, hbNotDel⟩
                simpa [Error.resultSet, Error.roleOfIn, hbS] using hbInDiff2
              have hbT : T b = true := by
                have hbKafter : Error.eval n T τ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))) := by
                  exact a_knows_after_t T τ (by simpa [Error.OSequence.length] using same_len) equ
                have hbTrueT : Error.eval n T τ (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) := true_of_knowldege hbKafter
                have : (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n b T τ := by
                  simpa [Error.eval] using hbTrueT
                have := (stubbornness (n := n) (S := T) (a := b) (k := true) (m := τ.length) (σ := τ) rfl).1
                exact this (by simpa [Error.eval] using hbTrueT)
              exact hbT
q

have hb' : S b = T b := by
                have := know_self (m := σ.length) (a := b) (S := S) (T := T)
                  (σ := ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                  (τ := τ.1) (h1 := rfl) (h2 := by simpa [OSequence.length_def] using same_len) equ
                simpa [h_b] using this
              simpa [hb'] using h_b
b'.symm

have hbS : S b = true := h_b
              have hSaTa : S a = T a := by
                have := know_self (n := n) (a := a)
                  (m := σ.length) (σ := ⟨σ, (⁻o)⟩) (τ := τ) (h1 := rfl) (h2 := same_len) equ
                simpa using this
              have haC : a = (C.pair).1 := by
                have : roleOfIn a C = Caller := by simpa [role_C] using (rfl : Caller = Caller)
                simpa [Call.pair] using (roleOfIn_eq_Caller_iff (a := a) (x := (C.pair).1) (y := (C.pair).2)).1 this
              have haC' : a = (Call.pair (⌜a c⌝)).1 := by simp [Call.pair]
              have hcC : c = (C.pair).2 := by
                have hx : C.pair = (⌜a c⌝ : Call).pair := by
                  have : (⌜a c⌝ : Call).pair = C.pair := by
                    have hc : roleOfIn a (⌜a c⌝ : Call) = Caller := by simp [roleOfIn]
                    have hc' : roleOfIn a C = Caller := by simpa [role_C] using (rfl : Caller = Caller)
                    have : (contribSet S ⟨σ, (⁻o)⟩ (⌜a c⌝)).2 = (contribSet T τ C).2 := by
                      simpa using same_contrib
                    have : (⌜a c⌝ : Call).pair = C.pair := by
                      have heq := (sameRole_of_equiv (a := a) (S := S) (T := T)
                        (σ := ⟨σ, (⁻o)⟩) (τ := τ.1) (C₁ := (⌜a c⌝ : Call)) (C₂ := C)
                        (o1 := (⁻o)) (o2 := by exact τ.2) (h1 := by simp [OSequence.length]) (h2 := by simpa [OSequence.length] using τ.2)
                        (by
                          have : equiv a (S, ⟨⟨(⌜a c⌝ : Call) :: σ, o⟩, by simp [OSequence.length]⟩)
                                      (T, ⟨⟨C :: τ.1.1, by exact τ.1.2⟩, by simpa [OSequence.length] using congrArg Nat.succ same_len⟩) := by
                                simpa [equiv, roleOfIn] using equ
                          exact this)).trans ?_
                      · simp at heq
                      · simp [Call.pair]
                    exact this
                  simpa [Call.pair] using this.symm
                simpa [Call.pair] using congrArg Prod.snd hx
              have : (contribSet S ⟨σ, (⁻o)⟩ (⌜a c⌝)).2 = (contribSet T τ C).2 := by
                simpa using same_contrib
              have hb_mem : (b, true) ∈ (contribSet S ⟨σ, (⁻o)⟩ (⌜a c⌝)).2 := by
                simpa [contribSet, haC'] using (true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t).1
              have : (b, true) ∈ (contribSet T τ C).2 := by simpa [this] using hb_mem
              simpa [contribSet, hcC] using this

have hbST : S b = T b := by
                have hb := know_self (n := n) (a := a)
                  (m := σ.length)
                  (σ := ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                  (τ := τ)
                  (h1 := by simp [Error.OSequence.length, Error.OSequence.length_def])
                  (h2 := by simpa [Error.OSequence.length, Error.OSequence.length_def] using same_len)
                  equ
                simpa using hb.symm
              simpa [h_b] using hbST

have := know_self (n := n) (a := b)
                  (m := σ.length)
                  (σ := ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                  (τ := τ.1)
                  (S := S) (T := T)
                  (h1 := rfl) (h2 := by simpa [OSequence.length_def] using same_len)
                  equ
                simpa [hbS] using this.symm
              simpa [hbS] using hbT.symm

have hbST : S b = T b := by
                simpa using (know_self (n := n) (a := b) (S := S) (T := T)
                  (m := σ.length) (σ := ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                  (τ := τ) rfl same_len equ)
              simpa [h_b] using hbST

have hb' : S b = T b := by
                have := know_self (a := b) (S := S) (T := T)
                  (m := σ.length)
                  (σ := ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                  (τ := τ.1)
                  (h1 := by rfl)
                  (h2 := by simpa [OSequence.length_def] using same_len)
                  equ
                exact this
              simpa [h_b] using hb'.symm

have hbT : (b, true) ∈ resultSet b T τ := by
                have hs : (S, ⟨⟨σ, Sequence.maxOne_cons o⟩, rfl⟩) ~_ b (T, τ) := by
                  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                  · simpa [OSequence.length_def] using same_len.symm
                  · exact equiv_Equivalence.2.1 equ.1
                simpa [indistinguishable_then_same_values hs] using hbS
              simpa [stubbornness] using hbT

have hb_mem : (b, true) ∈ (Error.contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ (Error.Call.normal n a c)).2 := by
                simpa [Error.contribSet, h_b] using (show (b, S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ from by
                  have := Error.true_of_knowldege (S:=S) (σ:=⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a:=a) (φ:=Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                  unfold Error.eval at this
                  simpa [Error.resultSet, Error.roleOfIn, h_b] using this)
              have hb_mem' : (b, true) ∈ (Error.contribSet n T τ C).2 := by simpa [same_contrib] using hb_mem
              have hc : C.pair = (a, c) := by
                have : (Error.Call.normal n a c).pair = C.pair := by
                  have := (Error.equiv_then_know_same (a:=a) (m:=σ.length) (S:=S) (σ:=⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                    (h1:=by simp [Error.OSequence.length, Error.OSequence.length_def]) (T:=T) (τ:=τ)
                    (h2:=by simpa [Error.OSequence.length, Error.OSequence.length_def] using same_len) equ (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))).1 a_knows_after_t
                  have := Error.true_of_knowldege (S:=T) (σ:=τ) (a:=a) (φ:=Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) this
                  unfold Error.eval at this
                  have : Error.roleOfIn n a C = Error.Role.Caller := by simpa [role_C] using rfl
                  have : (Error.contribSet n T τ C).2 = Error.resultSet n (Error.other n a C) T τ := by
                    cases C <;> simp [Error.contribSet, Error.other, Error.roleOfIn] at *
                  exact rfl
                simpa [Error.Call.pair] using this.symm
              cases C <;> simp [Error.Call.pair] at hc
              · subst hc
                simpa [Error.resultSet, Error.stubbornness] using (Error.stubbornness (n:=n) (S:=T) (a:=b) (k:=true) (σ:=τ) (m:=τ.length) rfl).1 hb_mem'
              · subst hc
                simpa [Error.resultSet, Error.stubbornness] using (Error.stubbornness (n:=n) (S:=T) (a:=b) (k:=true) (σ:=τ) (m:=τ.length) rfl).1 hb_mem'
              · subst hc
                simpa [Error.resultSet, Error.stubbornness] using (Error.stubbornness (n:=n) (S:=T) (a:=b) (k:=true) (σ:=τ) (m:=τ.length) rfl).1 hb_mem'
is

have : roleOfIn b (Call.normal (n := n) a c) = roleOfIn b C := by
                    have := (equiv (n := n) (k := OSequence.length n ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) b (S, ⟨⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩, Error.resultSet._proof_1 n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) (T, ⟨τ, by simpa [same_len, OSequence.length]⟩))
                    have := this.2.1
                    simpa [equiv] using this
                  simpa [hbC] using this.symm
                have hcontrib_b :
                    (contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ (Call.normal (n := n) a c)).2 =
                    (contribSet n T τ C).2 := by simpa using same_contrib
                have : (b, true) ∈ (contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ (Call.normal (n := n) a c)).2 := by
                  simp [contribSet, h_b]
                have : (b, true) ∈ (contribSet n T τ C).2 := by simpa [hcontrib_b] using this
                have : (b, true) ∈ resultSet n c T τ := by
                  cases C <;> simp [contribSet, Call.pair] at this ⊢ <;> exact this
                have : T b = true := by
                  have := (stubbornness (n := n) (S := T) (a := b) (k := true) (σ := τ) rfl).1
                  unfold eval at this
                  exact this this
                have : False := by simpa [hbT] using this
                exact False.elim this
              simp_all [h_b] at hbS

have hb_in_callee : (b, false) ∈ (Error.contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ (Error.Call.normal n a c)).2 := by
                simpa [Error.contribSet] using not_in_callee
              have hb_in_T_callee : (b, false) ∈ (Error.contribSet n T τ C).2 := by
                simpa [same_contrib] using hb_in_callee
              have hpair : (Error.Call.pair n (Error.Call.normal n a c)) = Error.Call.pair n C := by
                have := (show Error.Role.Caller = Error.roleOfIn n a (Error.Call.normal n a c) from by simp) 
                exact (sameRole_of_equiv (a:=a) (S:=S) (T:=T) (σ:=⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) (τ:=τ) (C₁:=Error.Call.normal n a c) (C₂:=C)
                  (by
                    have := equ
                    simpa [Error.equiv] using this)).elim ?_ 
              have a_is_caller : roleOfIn a C = Caller := by
                simpa [role_C] using congrArg id role_C.symm
              have C_pair : C.pair = (a, c) := by
                have : C.pair = (Error.Call.normal n a c).pair := by
                  have eqpair : (Error.Call.normal n a c).pair = C.pair := by
                    have hrole : roleOfIn a (Error.Call.normal n a c) = roleOfIn a C := by
                      exact (sameRole_of_equiv (a:=a) (S:=S) (T:=T) (σ:=⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) (τ:=τ) (C₁:=Error.Call.normal n a c) (C₂:=C) equ).symm
                    cases C <;> simp [Call.pair] at *
                  simpa [Call.pair] using eqpair
                simpa [Call.pair] using this.symm
              have a_neq_b : a ≠ b := by
                intro hab
                subst hab
                have : (b, false) ∉ Error.resultSet n b T τ := by
                  simpa using (not_notMem_resultSet (n:=n) (S:=T) (σ:=τ) (b:=b))
                have : (b, false) ∈ Error.resultSet n b T τ := by
                  have : (b, false) ∈ (Error.contribSet n T τ C).2 := hb_in_T_callee
                  cases C <;> simp [Error.contribSet] at this
                exact this.elim (this)
              have : S a = T a := by
                have := know_self (n:=n) (a:=a) (m:=σ.length) (S:=S) (T:=T)
                  (σ:=⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                  (τ:=τ)
                  (h1:=by rfl)
                  (h2:=by simpa [Error.OSequence.length] using same_len)
                  equ
                exact this
              have : T b = S b := by
                have hbS : S b = true := h_b
                by_cases hba : b = a
                · subst hba
                  simpa [hbS] using congrArg id this.symm
                · have hbT : (b, false) ∉ Error.resultSet n b T τ := by
                    simpa using (not_notMem_resultSet (n:=n) (S:=T) (σ:=τ) (b:=b))
                  have : (b, false) ∈ Error.resultSet n b T τ := by
                    cases C <;> simp [Error.contribSet] at hb_in_T_callee
                    · exact hb_in_T_callee
                    · exact hb_in_T_callee
                    · exact hb_in_T_callee
                  exact False.elim (hbT this)
              simpa [this, h_b]
is)

have := know_self (a := b) (S := S) (T := T)
                  (m := σ.length)
                  (σ := ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                  (τ := τ.1)
                  (h1 := by
                    simp [OSequence.length_def, OSequence.length] )
                  (h2 := by simpa [OSequence.length_def, OSequence.length] using same_len) equ
                exact this ▸ hbS
              exact hbT

have ht : (b, true) ∈ (Error.contribSet n T τ C).2 := by
                simpa [contribSet, h_b] using (congrArg (fun s => (b, true) ∈ s) same_contrib) ▸
                  (by
                    change (b, true) ∈ (contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ (⌜a c⌝)).2
                    simp [contribSet, resultSet, ra, h_b])
              have : Error.eval n T τ (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) := by
                simpa [eval] using ht
              simpa [stubbornness, eval] using this
bT

simpa using this
              simp [h_b, hb', equ_base] at equ_base

have hb_in_callee : (b, false) ∈ (Error.contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ (Error.Call.normal n a c)).2 := by
                simpa [Error.contribSet] using not_in_callee
              have hb_in_T : (b, false) ∈ Error.resultSet n c T τ := by
                have : (Error.contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ (Error.Call.normal n a c)).2 =
                    (Error.contribSet n T τ C).2 := same_contrib
                have hb_in_T' : (b, false) ∈ (Error.contribSet n T τ C).2 := by simpa [this] using hb_in_callee
                simpa [Error.contribSet] using hb_in_T'
              by_contra hTb
              have : Error.eval n T τ (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) := by
                simpa [Error.eval, hTb] using hb_in_T
              simpa [h_b] using this

have hb : S b = T b := by
                have heq := know_self (n := n) (a := b) (S := S) (T := T)
                  (m := σ.length) (σ := ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                  (τ := τ) (h1 := rfl) (h2 := same_len) equ
                simpa [heq] using heq.symm
              simpa [hb] using h_b
is
bT.symm
